compiled_state.title: Env-var standardization audit (REBAR_<KEY> prefix + alias windows)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Why
rebar has ~40 distinct env vars across ~150 read sites; only ~half are REBAR_-prefixed. Standardizing on REBAR_<KEY> is a BREAKING rename of established public vars (PROJECT_ROOT, JIRA_URL/USER/API_TOKEN, TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR, ...), each needing an alias/deprecation window — larger than a docs change.

## What
Catalog every env var + read site; decide per var keep/rename/remove (informed by the interactive env-var review in session); implement REBAR_ prefixing with back-compat aliases; route reads through the typed Config.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Full inventory of env vars + read sites with a keep/rename/remove decision each
- [ ] REBAR_<KEY> standardization with alias windows for renamed public vars
- [ ] Reads routed through the typed Config (single source of truth)
- [ ] Docs + tests; full suite green

comments.body:
Interactive env-var review — decision log (vars 1-6 of ~40):
1. REBAR_ROOT — KEEP (foundational repo-root override; standard <TOOL>_ROOT).
2. PROJECT_ROOT — REMOVE (unprefixed duplicate of REBAR_ROOT; DSO/plugin-era; hard remove per user).
3. REBAR_CONFIG — KEEP (config-file pointer; matches RUFF_CONFIG/PIP_CONFIG_FILE convention).
4. TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR — MODIFY: rename REBAR_TRACKER_DIR (decoupled/renamed store is a SUPPORTED feature per user; alias old name during deprecation).
5. REBAR_PUSH — MODIFY: rename REBAR_SYNC_PUSH (outbound push policy always/async/off; alias REBAR_PUSH).
6. REBAR_NO_SYNC — MODIFY: rename REBAR_SYNC_PULL (inbound fetch/merge; flip negative boolean -> positive on/off, default on; alias REBAR_NO_SYNC; --no-sync flag -> --no-pull). Vars 5+6 unify the sync model under REBAR_SYNC_{PUSH,PULL} so naming reflects direction.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
Decision log (vars 7-9):
7. _TICKET_TEST_NO_SYNC — REMOVE (private test flag; fold into REBAR_SYNC_PULL=off / REBAR_SYNC_PUSH=off).
8. TICKET_SYNC_CMD — REMOVE + replace shell-out (dead-by-default: shells 'ticket sync' via shell=True, no such subcommand -> 127 -> no-op; injection smell. Replace sync-before-compact with a direct in-process pull or drop it).
9. REBAR_TICKET_CLI — REMOVE, self-resolve (internal parent->subprocess handoff of the CLI path; never set to non-default; each reconciler/validate subprocess already falls back to in_process_cli() — call it directly and delete the var).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
Decision log (vars 10-12):
10. TICKET_CMD — REMOVE (dead bash-era test-injection seam in validate; never set; validate reads in-process).
11. REBAR_SIGNING_KEY — KEEP (HMAC signing secret; correctly env-sourced; on-convention; per-env fallback).
12. COMPACT_THRESHOLD — MODIFY: rename REBAR_COMPACT_THRESHOLD + expose as [tool.rebar] compact.threshold config key (env overrides file; alias old). PATTERN: tuning settings -> config key + REBAR_-prefixed env override + alias.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
Decision log (var 13):
13. REBAR_ID_GUARD_MODE -> MODIFY/RENAME: REBAR_UNSAFE_ID_GUARD_BYPASS (boolean true/false, default false). It is a TEMPORARY BYPASS of the rebar-id label-write authorization guard (the identity primitive binding local tickets<->Jira issues), NOT a persistent 'mode' — leaving it on risks duplicate/orphaned issues. Semantics: false => guard active (old 'raise', fail-closed); true => bypass (old 'warn': log+allow). Config key: reconciler.id_guard_bypass_unsafe. Emit a LOUD warning every sync while engaged. Alias old env REBAR_ID_GUARD_MODE + config rebar_id_guard_mode (value map: raise->false, warn->true) during deprecation. Values move from raise/warn to true/false.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
Decision log (var 14):
14. REBAR_FSCK_NO_MUTATE -> REMOVE. No genuine user scenario: fsck's ONLY mutation is removing a stale .git/index.lock (>5min); the flag downgrades that to a warn. No CLI flag; the only setter is the library's internal context manager (__init__.py) that round-trips read-only intent through os.environ so read paths (list/show) don't delete the lock. Fix: read paths call the scan with no_mutate=True via the EXISTING parameter (_scan(tracker, no_mutate)); CLI fsck always mutates; delete the env var + the os.environ set/pop smell.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Decision log (var 15): _REBAR_GC_AUTO_ZERO -> REMOVE (dead never-set private flag; existing gc.auto value-check already avoids the redundant git-config call). --- CORE STORE CLUSTER COMPLETE (vars 1-15). Patterns established: secrets->keep(env); tuning settings->config-key + REBAR_<KEY> env override + alias; dead/internal/shell-out->remove.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
Decision log (Clusters A/B/C):
CLUSTER A (MCP gates): REBAR_MCP_READONLY=KEEP; REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_LLM=KEEP; REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE -> RENAME REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_JIRA_SYNC (config mcp.allow_jira_sync; gates live/applying Jira writes vs dry-run default; alias old).
CLUSTER B (LLM): keep prefix; settings ALSO become [tool.rebar] llm.* config keys (env overrides), secret env-only:
  REBAR_LLM_MODEL/MODEL_PROVIDER/BASE_URL/MAX_TOKENS/TIMEOUT/REPO_PATH/MCP_SERVERS -> KEEP + config keys (llm.*); MCP_SERVERS uses TOML nesting (retire JSON-in-env).
  REBAR_LLM_API_KEY -> KEEP (secret, env-only).
  REBAR_LLM_MAX_ITERS -> RENAME REBAR_LLM_MAX_STEPS + config llm.max_steps; DOC: 'max agent loop steps before abort; ~2 steps/tool-call; default 25~=12 tool calls; raise if review hits step budget'.
  REBAR_LLM_RUNNER -> REMOVE as public knob. DERIVE: langflow auto-selected when LANGFLOW_URL+FLOW_ID configured, else in-process langgraph. fake -> test-only injection (library arg, off public surface). deepagents -> experimental opt-in flag REBAR_LLM_EXPERIMENTAL_HARNESS=deepagents (clearly experimental).
CLUSTER C (external secrets): ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, LANGFUSE_PUBLIC_KEY/SECRET_KEY/HOST, LANGFLOW_URL/FLOW_ID/API_KEY -> KEEP ALL (third-party STANDARD names read by provider/Langfuse/Langflow SDKs; do NOT rebar-namespace). Doc gap: only in docs/llm-framework.md, not README; no single config reference -> config epic docs task f81a to unify.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
Decision log (Clusters D/E/F) — env-var sweep COMPLETE:
CLUSTER D (Jira): JIRA_API_TOKEN=KEEP (secret, env/.env); JIRA_URL/USER/PROJECT=KEEP + config jira.url/user/project (Atlassian-ecosystem JIRA_ names retained; 4 form one credential bundle, matches b5db onboarding).
CLUSTER E (reconciler tunables — advanced, rarely-needed; sensible defaults kept; RENAME for clarity + config-ify under reconciler.*):
  REBAR_ACLI_TIMEOUT -> REBAR_JIRA_CLI_TIMEOUT (config reconciler.jira_cli_timeout); 'acli'=Atlassian CLI jargon.
  REBAR_RECONCILER_LOCK_RETRY_BUDGET (def 5) -> REBAR_RECONCILER_LOCK_MAX_RETRIES (config reconciler.lock_max_retries); 'budget'->max_retries.
  RECONCILER_ABSENT_GET_BUDGET (def 20) -> REBAR_RECONCILER_DELETION_PROBE_LIMIT (config reconciler.deletion_probe_limit); opaque 'absent get budget' = GET probes to confirm a Jira issue is really deleted; + add missing REBAR_ prefix.
CLUSTER F (misc):
  WORKFLOW_CONFIG_FILE -> REMOVE (DSO vestige; DSO epic d7cf WU-1).
  REBAR_RUN_EXTERNAL -> KEEP (test-tier billable-suite opt-in; test infra).
  TICKET_WORDLIST_PATH -> INTERNALIZE: engine_env pins it for subprocesses; self-resolve in the subprocess (same as REBAR_TICKET_CLI removal); not a user knob.
  SESSION_ID -> KEEP for now; follow-up ticket 83f2 (requires explicit user approval before change).
  SCRATCH_BASE_DIR -> RENAME REBAR_SCRATCH_BASE_DIR + config scratch.base_dir (LIVE per-ticket agent scratch feature, default .rebar/scratch; not DSO).
=== SWEEP COMPLETE: ~48 distinct vars reviewed across 6 clusters + core. ===
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: STORY COMPLETE (config-loop). Env-var standardization done across EV-1..EV-4 (decomposed into 10 sub-tickets, all closed). Summary: full ~48-var inventory reviewed (decision log above); REBAR_<KEY> standardization with deprecation alias windows for every renamed public var; reads routed through the typed Config where a config key exists. Delivered: EV-1 sync model (REBAR_SYNC_PUSH/PULL + REBAR_PUSH/REBAR_NO_SYNC aliases, --no-pull); EV-2 dead/internal removals (PROJECT_ROOT, TICKET_CMD, REBAR_TICKET_CLI, TICKET_WORDLIST_PATH, _REBAR_GC_AUTO_ZERO, TICKET_SYNC_CMD, REBAR_FSCK_NO_MUTATE param-ify) + subprocess self-resolve; EV-3 user-facing renames (COMPACT_THRESHOLD, SCRATCH_BASE_DIR, REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE->ALLOW_JIRA_SYNC, TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR->REBAR_TRACKER_DIR, REBAR_ACLI_TIMEOUT->REBAR_JIRA_CLI_TIMEOUT, LOCK_RETRY_BUDGET->LOCK_MAX_RETRIES, ABSENT_GET_BUDGET->DELETION_PROBE_LIMIT, REBAR_LLM_MAX_ITERS->REBAR_LLM_MAX_STEPS, REBAR_ID_GUARD_MODE->REBAR_UNSAFE_ID_GUARD_BYPASS value-flip); EV-4 REBAR_LLM_RUNNER removed (runner derived). Every rename keeps the old name working during a deprecation window with a warning. Docs + tests throughout; full offline suite green (1968); ruff check+format clean; verify gate fail-closed preserved. ACs met.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
